text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity here. The first image suggests the threshold of a space where ideas are discussed or learned, and the second immerses me in an environment dedicated to research and development. Surrounded by words, images, and thoughtful displays, I feel both small and inspired, aware of the collective human effort to understand, innovate, and communicate. My mind buzzes with questions, eager to explore the connections between people, technology, and meaning.
